name: Best Chocolate Pudding or Pie- Mom
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the chopped chocolate to the milk in a double boiler and heat until melted.
2. Beat together until blended.
3. Sift sugar, flour, and salt into the mixture and stir in a small amount of hot chocolate.
4. Pour this back into the double boiler with the remaining hot chocolate and stir.
5. Add 2 tablespoons butter to the mixture and cook with constant stirring for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Carefully pour a small amount of the cooked mixture over the well-beaten egg yolks, stirring constantly to avoid cooking the eggs.
7. Return the mixture to the double boiler and continue stirring until thick.
8. Remove from heat when starting to thicken, add vanilla, and stir.
9. Cool in a baked pie shell for pie or in 6-8 Pyrex cups for pudding.
10. Meringue: Beat 3 egg whites with 6 tablespoons sugar (optional) over the pie. Serve plain or with a small amount of vanilla ice cream on the side. This recipe is rich and delicious!
